heading: Track - 1( 2/2) : Full Stack Development for Intelligent Research Assistant Platform
text: Track - 1( 2/2) : Full Stack Development for Intelligent Research Assistant Platform The objective is to first create: A Research Workspace Platform that later integrates with: RAG pipelines, vector databases, LLM APIs, AI agents. Problem Researchers and students often struggle to: organize research papers, manage notes, search uploaded documents, track project discussions, maintain conversation history, collaborate efficiently. Existing systems are either: difficult to use, fragmented, not AI-integrated, or lack research workflow management. Objective Design and develop a centralized web-based Research Workspace Dashboard that allows users to: upload and manage research documents, organize projects, interact through conversational chat, maintain research history, prepare the platform for future AI-powered document understanding and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) integration.

heading: MODULE 1 — Research Workspace Dashboard
text: MODULE 1 Research Workspace Dashboard Objective Create a centralized dashboard for research activities. Features User can: Login/Register Create projects Upload documents View uploaded papers Open conversations View summaries/history UI Components Sidebar Navigation Contains: Dashboard My Projects Uploads Chat History Settings Main Dashboard Displays: Recent projects Uploaded files Activity history Statistics Learning Objectives Students learn: React components Routing State management Dashboard architecture Simplified Deliverable A responsive dashboard where: users can navigate, create projects, manage documents.

heading: MODULE 2 — PDF Upload & Document Management
text: MODULE 2 PDF Upload Document Management Objective Develop secure document upload and storage functionality. Features Users can: Upload PDFs Upload DOC/DOCX Add notes Delete documents View document metadata Metadata to Store filename upload date project name document type file size Learning Objectives Students learn: File upload APIs Storage systems Metadata handling Backend validation Simplified Deliverable Users can upload files and see them in dashboard. NO AI processing yet.

heading: MODULE 3 — Chat Interface
text: MODULE 3 Chat Interface Objective Build ChatGPT-like UI for future AI integration. Features Chat Window User messages AI response placeholder Typing animation Conversation History Save chats Open old chats Simplified Deliverable A working conversational interface connected to dummy backend responses. Example: User: Summarize this paper Backend: AI response will appear here.

heading: MODULE 4 — Backend API System
text: MODULE 4 Backend API System Objective Create backend services connecting frontend and future AI modules. Required APIs User APIs POST /register Create user. POST /login Authenticate user. Document APIs POST /upload Upload document. GET /documents Retrieve uploaded files. DELETE /document/id Delete document. Chat APIs POST /ask Send user message. GET /history Retrieve conversation history. Future AI APIs (Placeholder) POST /summarize POST /compare_papers Currently: Return mock responses. Later: Connected to AI pipeline. Simplified Deliverable Complete API backend with: authentication, file management, chat endpoints.

heading: MODULE 5 — Database Design
text: MODULE 5 Database Design Objective Store platform data properly. Required Tables Users Table Stores: user_id name email password_hash Projects Table Stores: project_id user_id project_name Documents Table Stores: document_id filename upload_date project_id Conversations Table Stores: conversation_id user_id messages Simplified Deliverable Working database integrated with backend.

heading: MODULE 6 — Real-Time Communication
text: MODULE 6 Real-Time Communication Objective Prepare platform for streaming AI responses. Features Live Chat Streaming Responses appear gradually. Upload Status Display: uploading, processing, completed. Learning Objectives WebSockets Async programming Event-driven systems Simplified Deliverable Frontend receives streaming mock responses. Example: Generating summary

heading: MODULE 7 — Deployment & DevOps
text: MODULE 7 Deployment DevOps Objective Deploy publicly accessible application. Components Frontend Deployment Deploy React app. Backend Deployment Deploy APIs. Database Deployment Cloud DB connection. DevOps Learning Students learn: Docker Environment variables GitHub Actions CI/CD Simplified Deliverable Publicly accessible prototype.
